form.formComment: Finished third (29.97) at this track last time at big odds, making it three placings in a row. Boxed the fence this time. Looks tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Improved two runs back to score then won again last start over 520m at this track (29.59), beating Charming Chicka. Looks the one to beat.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 3.5 lengths second at Wentworth Park but did record a solid 29.85 over the 520m trip. Expected to push the clock again here.

form.formComment: Impressive performance showing plenty of speed to post a big 3.5 lengths victory in a Grade 5 last start at Goulburn, recording a good 24.85 over the 440m journey. In form and worth thought again.
